sentences.translation: Muhammed je htio kupiti novi telefon.
sentences.translationEn: Mohammed wanted to buy a new phone.
He saved his money for four months.

sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ إِلَى المَحَلِّ وَسَأَلَ عَنِ الأَسْعَارِ.
sentences.translation: Otišao je u prodavnicu i pitao za cijene.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the shop and asked about prices.

sentences.arabic: اخْتَارَ هَاتِفًا مُنَاسِبًا بِالمَبْلَغِ الذِي جَمَعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Odabrao je odgovarajući telefon za iznos koji je sakupio.
sentences.translationEn: He chose a suitable phone with the amount he had saved.
